starjob_small_2x2.instruction: Optimize schedule for 2 Jobs (denoted as J) across 2 Machines (denoted as M) to minimize makespan. The makespan is the completion time of the last operation in the schedule. Each M can process only one J at a time, and once started, J cannot be interrupted.

lawrence_la01_original.name: la01
lawrence_la01_original.description: Lawrence 10x5 instance (Table 3, instance 1); also called (setf1) or (F1)
lawrence_la01_original.format: First line: '<num_jobs> <num_machines>'. Each subsequent line is one job as (machine, duration) pairs in routing order.

lawrence_la01_prompt_style.instruction: Optimize schedule for 10 Jobs (denoted as J) across 5 Machines (denoted as M) to minimize makespan. The makespan is the completion time of the last operation in the schedule. Each M can process only one J at a time, and once started, J cannot be interrupted.
